title: quercus × puentei
intro: Quercus × puentei, also known as the Puente Oak or hybrid White Oak, is a deciduous tree resulting from a natural hybrid between the English Oak (Quercus robur) and the sessile Oak (Quercus petraea). This tree is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which are attributed to the presence of tannins and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Quercus × puentei include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. The bark, leaves, and acorns of the Quercus × puentei can be used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
